assertions.expectation: Explains the difference between Rapid and Stable channels — including that Rapid has no SLA for upgrade stability while Stable carries a full SLA, and clearly distinguishes minor version vs patch version differences between the channels
assertions.reason: Response mentions version differences and maintenance windows but fails to explain the SLA differences between channels or clearly distinguish between minor vs patch version handling differences

assertions.expectation: Notes that channel changes don't trigger an immediate upgrade or downgrade
assertions.reason: Response incorrectly states that changing channels 'will trigger a version change' and shows commands suggesting immediate version changes occur

assertions.expectation: Warns that if 1.30 isn't yet available on Stable, the cluster may not receive patches until Stable catches up
assertions.reason: Response does not mention the potential gap in patch availability if the current version isn't yet available on the target channel

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command to change the release channel
assertions.reason: Response provides the correct gcloud command: 'gcloud container clusters update CLUSTER_NAME --zone=ZONE --release-channel=stable'

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking version availability on Stable before switching (gcloud container get-server-config)
assertions.reason: Response includes the command 'gcloud container get-server-config --zone=ZONE' and mentions checking what Stable version will be available

assertions.expectation: Discusses the impact on auto-upgrade timing going forward
assertions.reason: Response mentions that Stable has 'Less frequent updates (every 2-3 months)' and 'More predictable update schedule on Stable' which addresses future auto-upgrade timing

assertions.expectation: Mentions that the Extended channel is an option if they need even slower cadence (with cost implications)
assertions.reason: Response does not mention the Extended channel option at all

assertions.expectation: Advises coordinating the change during a maintenance window
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'Schedule during maintenance window' in the best practices section
